description: Product Description Feature 3 Pieces Glasses Chain - wide range of uses, suitable for most glasses frames, can be used with glasses, sunglasses, reading glasses. Rich Colors - Each length is 72 cm / 28.34 inch, this length is enough to hold any of your glasses. Glasses strap has 3 colors, namely black, dark brown, dark blue, different colors can match your different glasses and clothes, making you different every day. Comfortable to Wear - When you are not wearing glasses, the glasses neck strap can fix the glasses on your neck. You don't have to worry about losing or not finding them when you are outdoors. Not only do you don't have to worry about losing your glasses, but you can also relieve ear pressure. It is comfortable to wear without stress. The spectacle chain holder is designed with adjustable end and anti-slip loop, the glasses lanyard holder can adjust to fit your head perfectly. Durable Leather Material These glasses straps are made of leather, they are smooth and comfortable to use and will not harm your skin. Anti Slip Design The straps at both ends are adjustable, which is easy to wear and take off, so you don't have to worry about glasses falling when you bend down. Simple and Stylish The texture of leather, porcelain beads to highlight the style. Easy to Use 1. Glasses chain ends with metal coils, it can be simply moved 2. Just tighten the loops to ear wires, push up the metal coils 3. Then the glasses cord can hold tight to the ear wires of your glasses, unable to fall off Wide Application - Suitable for most glasses frames, can be used with glasses, sunglasses, reading glasses, safety glasses, especially play an important role in sports and outdoor activities. Easy to store, convenient and small, you can put it in your pocket or bag when you are not using it, it is very convenient whether at home or outside. See More
